body: Foreign outflows hit Indonesia’s JCI, dragging it down 0.79%. Wall Street steadies after sell-off; Trump hikes tariffs on Canadian steel.

title: Trump’s 50 Percent Tariff on Canadian Metals Sparks Recession Fears
body: Trump raises tariffs on Canadian steel and aluminum to 50%, escalating a trade war as markets slide and recession fears grow.

title: Gov't Calls on Ride-Hailing Companies to Give 20% Eid Bonuses to Top Drivers
body: Indonesia urges ride-hailing firms to provide Eid bonuses for drivers. Gojek, Grab comply, while Maxim refuses.

title: Vietnam’s VinFast to Build Up to 100,000 EV Chargers in Indonesia
body: VinFast intends to establish between 30,000 and 100,000 charging stations across Indonesia in its initial phase.

title: Nissan's Chief Executive Steps Down after Dismal Results
body: Nissan is projecting a loss of 80 billion yen ($540 million) for the full fiscal year through the end of this month.

title: Indonesian Consumers Lose Confidence in Economy: Central Bank
body: February's consumer confidence index has dropped from 127.2 to 126.4 in February, a survey by Bank Indonesia shows.

title: Danantara Will Only Pick Investment-Ready Projects, CEO Says
body: Danantara will take into account the project's land availability and the return, among others, before actually investing.

title: Indonesia to Build New 1 Million-Bpd Oil Refineries Across Major Islands
body: Initially, the government projected a capacity of 500,000 bpd per refinery but later doubled the target to 1 million bpd.

title: Ride-Hailing Companies Split on Prabowo’s Eid Bonus Request
body: Gojek & Grab to give Eid incentives to drivers, while Maxim declines cash payments, citing legal grounds.

title: BBN Airlines Exits Indonesia’s Passenger Market, Shifts to Leasing Model
body: BBN Airlines exits Indonesia’s passenger market, shifting to aircraft leasing amid global fleet shortages.

title: Singapore-Backed Indonesia Airlines Seeks Market Entry
body: Indonesia Airlines, backed by Singapore’s Calypte Holding, plans to compete globally but awaits regulatory approval in Indonesia.

title: Prabowo Urges Ride Hailing Companies to Give Drivers Eid Bonuses
body: Prabowo says that these ride-hailing drivers and couriers have largely contributed to Indonesia's transportation services.

body: Vietnam's party leader To Lam says that ASEAN is also on track to be the world's fourth-largest economy by 2030.

body: Prabowo is planning to establish cooperatives across 80,000 Indonesian villages to make food commodities more affordable.

body: To date, only two state companies Pegadaian and Bank Syariah Indonesia that are running Indonesia's gold bullion banks.

body: Launched in July 2022, Minyakita was introduced to address Indonesia’s shortage of affordable cooking oil.

body: Victory Chingluh, located in Cikupa District, has cut around 2,000 jobs since January.

body: President Prabowo presents Danantara to Ray Dalio, highlighting its potential to drive economic growth and attract global investment.

body: Agricultural Minister Andi Amran also urges sellers to not sell food commodities beyond the maximum retail price.

body: Starting next year, the EU will require importers to pay for the emissions associated with their goods' production.

body: Some of these tycoons include real estate magnates Sugianto "Aguan" Kusuma and James Riady.

body: Stocks fell even though Trump offered a one-month reprieve from his 25 percent tariffs on many goods imported from Mexico and Canada.

title: Chinese and German Investors Eye Indonesian Bamboo Cultivation
body: The project could involve up to 20,000 villages across Indonesia, fostering massive community participation in bamboo cultivation.

title: Government to Launch 4,500 Food Outlets with Price Caps
body: The initiative aims to stabilize food prices and prevent market volatility by ensuring public access to affordable food.

body: The total fleet consists of 95 aircraft, comprising 61 Garuda Indonesia planes and 34 Citilink planes.

title: What to Know About Trump’s Tariffs and Their Impact
body: Trump’s tariffs on China, Canada, and Mexico take effect, raising costs for businesses and consumers.

title: SEG Solar to Begin PV Panel Production in April
body: Once fully operational, the PV project is projected to generate 3,000 new jobs.

title: Danantara to Announce Full Organizational Structure, Potentially Including Former Presidents
body: Both former leaders were present on stage when President Prabowo Subianto officially launched Danantara on February 24.

body: The government is planning to slap an excise tax on sugary drinks starting in the second half of 2025.

body: Declining market demand and strategic decisions by parent companies have forced many factories to cease production.

title: Pertamina: Independent Tests Confirm Fuel Meets Standards
body: Pertamina assures its fuel meets standards amid tampering claims, citing independent tests.

title: ABB: Indonesia May Miss Net Zero Goal, but Progress Matters More
body: ABB’s Anders Maltesen says Indonesia may not hit net zero by 2060, but steady progress and collaboration will ensure a sustainable future.

title: Bank BJB Denies Its Boss Yuddy Renaldi Resigns Due to Corruption
body: Bank BJB denies that Yuddy Renaldi's resignation has anything to do with KPK's ongoing probe into the company's ad placements.

title: Indonesia, Australia Renew $6.2 Billion Currency Swap Deal
body: This marks the first time for Australia and Indonesia to extend the currency swap arrangement by another five years.

title: Indonesia’s Coal Exporters Seek Six-Month Grace Period for Pricing Rule
body: Indonesia’s coal industry urges a six-month transition for the new export pricing rule, citing concerns over business stability and contract

title: Indonesia Says French Nickel Miner Eramet Wants to Partner with Danantara
body: Indonesia's newly established sovereign wealth fund Danantara begins to gain popularity among foreign investors.

title: East Java Gas Stations Face Sales Drop Over Fuel Tampering Claims
body: Pertamina tests fuel at 957 gas stations in East Java after tampering claims. Lab results pending as sales drop due to consumer concerns

title: Malaysian Plastic Giant Thong Guan to Set Up $7 Million Factory in C. Java
body: Thong Guan Industries will set up a production plant over a 5-hectare land in Central Java's Batang integrated industrial park.

title: Jasa Marga’s 2024 Revenue Jumps 20 Pct on Strong Toll Earnings
body: Jasa Marga posts 20% revenue growth in 2024, hitting Rp18.73T, with core profit up 36% to Rp3.7T, driven by strong toll road earnings.
